title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.330 - Return and answer may be amended
text:
532.330.  Return and answer may be amended. — The return and the allegations made against it may be amended, by leave of the court before whom the writ is returned at any time, that thereby material facts may be ascertained.
(RSMo 1939 § 1618, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1454; 1919 § 1904; 1909 § 2469 
Effective 1-02-79
